parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Enables/disables the Web Render .

parameters.name: source
parameters.label: Source
parameters.description: Source of the webpage, which can be an address via URL or File, or data from a

parameters.name: url
parameters.label: URL or File
parameters.description: Uniform Resource Locator or the address of the web page

parameters.name: dat
parameters.label: DAT
parameters.description: Text to be loaded into a webpage

parameters.name: reloadsrc
parameters.label: Reload Source
parameters.description: Reload source , URL or File.

parameters.name: reload
parameters.label: Reload Current Page
parameters.description: Reloads the current page, the same as refreshing a web browser.

parameters.name: resetcount
parameters.label: Reset Update Count
parameters.description: Reset the counter for the number of times the webpage has been updated (available via an Info ).

parameters.name: updatewhenloaded
parameters.label: Only Update when Loaded
parameters.description: Only shows the web page when it is full loaded.

parameters.name: alwayscook
parameters.label: Cook Always
parameters.description: every frame if on.  If off, the Web Render will cook for a 10 additional frames after the last update received to maintain continuity.

parameters.name: transparent
parameters.label: Transparent Background
parameters.description: Loads the webpage with a transparent background.  This option will restart the browser process.

parameters.name: audio
parameters.label: Audio Options
parameters.description: Let the browser process play audio if the web page contains audio.  This option will restart the browser process.

parameters.name: mediastream
parameters.label: Enable Media Stream
parameters.description: Allows the web render instance to use the mic and the camera.

parameters.name: redirectpopups
parameters.label: Redirect Popups
parameters.description: Instead of ignorning popups, the Web Render switches to the url for the popup.

parameters.name: maxrenderrate
parameters.label: Maximum Render Frame Rate
parameters.description: Sets the maximum frame rate the page will be rendered at.  Can be higher than 60 but does not guarantee a frame rate.

parameters.name: numbuffers
parameters.label: Number of Frame Buffers
parameters.description: Sets the maximum number of cached images

parameters.name: dpiscale
parameters.label: DPI Scaling Factor
parameters.description: Sets the DPI scaling factor for the rendered webpage.  Default expression matches the DPI Scale for monitor 0 of TouchDesigner.

parameters.name: sharedtexture
parameters.label: Use Shared Texture
parameters.description: Share a Direct3d 11 texture between TouchDesigner and TouchDesignerWebRender process instead of using shared memory, which is less efficient.  Windows only.

parameters.name: userdir
parameters.label: User Cache Directory
parameters.description: Persistent directory used by cef for storing user data.  Note that the directory must be unique per Web Render , otherwise the will error.  By default, a temporary user cache directory is generated fo

parameters.name: headerdat
parameters.label: Modify Header DAT
parameters.description: Modify request headers for a given url.  Specify a table with columns Name, Value & URL.  For a matching URL in the url columen, the corresponding name and value will be inserted into the request head

parameters.name: options
parameters.label: Options
parameters.description: Additional options that can be passed to the browser process.  This option will restart the browser process.  A list of options for the chromium browser can be found at .  Note that these options may

parameters.name: autorestart
parameters.label: Restart if Process Died
parameters.description: Automatically restart the browser process if it died.

parameters.name: autorestartpulse
parameters.label: Restart
parameters.description: Triggers the Restart immediately on button release (button-up). This can be accessed in python using the pulse() method.
